description: Style NoteIt's all about collective energy! So spruce yourself up and feel like a hero in this marvel Comics T-shirt from free authority. Featuring the Incredible Hulk, one of the most popular heroes produced by marvel Comics in the last 70 years, this tee has all you need to feel powerful. Pair it with sneakers and denims.Product DetailsBlue crew neck T-shirt with short sleeves and Hulk printed on the frontMaterial and Care60% cotton and 40% polyesterMachine wash cold with like coloursTumble dry lowSize and FitRegular FitThe  model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
